title: chrysopogon borneensis
intro: Chrysopogon borneensis, also known as Borneo lemongrass or vetiver grass, is a plant species native to the tropical regions of Borneo. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its oil, which has been used to treat various health issues due to its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antispasmodic properties. The health benefits of Chrysopogon borneensis include reducing fever, relieving pain and swelling, and promoting relaxation and stress relief, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies. Chrysopogon borneensis oil can be used in herbal preparations such as essential oils, teas, and topical creams, and is often used in aromatherapy and traditional medicine practices.
